variants.label: Source Stack
variants.description: Render the scraped property fields without section headers. Keep this only for intentionally unlabeled variants.

variants.label: Supplemental Sections
variants.description: Keep the fact stack and main description unlabeled, but label supplemental fields like amenities and reviews.

variants.label: Fully Sectioned
variants.description: Render all property sections with explicit headers, matching the live-site property template structure.
